violations.text: Dust pan and coffee mugs were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (retail food storage shelves) have an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2024

The floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or other debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2024

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (front storage and walk in cooler) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2024
